name: default
description: Default orchestrator + first-run seed + tutor. Entry point for /workflow.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: Free-form user request. Empty = open dashboard.

inputs.name: initialized
inputs.description: True when both preferences:user and the workspace preferences carry workflow_initialized=true. Injected by the /workflow skill before dispatch.

inputs.name: tutor_completed
inputs.description: True when preferences:user.tutor.completed is set. Injected by the /workflow skill before dispatch.

outputs.name: seed_outcome
outputs.description: URI of the seed-outcome artifact when seed ran; empty otherwise.

steps.description: First-run seed. Calls workflowlib.seed.detect_repo + seed(). On GitHub: writes preferences:workspace.storage.state=execution-gh-pr and preferences:user.storage.lock=gh-gist; asks via AskUserQuestion whether to enable the gh-issue dependency overlay. Off GitHub: asks which state backend to use. Sets workflow_initialized=true on both preference scopes.

Walk the user through the workflow + artifact primitives, enumerate installed extensions, and offer a guided try-it. Fires whenever seed ran (initialized was false at dispatch) or tutor_completed is false. Sets preferences:user.extra.tutor_completed=true on finish.
Interpret intent against the shallow registry; decide what to load.
Load what's needed; dispatch or render.
